title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with LIC! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
